RAHUL MENON
DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer — Bengaluru, India

SUMMARY
Site Reliability and DevOps engineer with 6 years building and operating
cloud-native infrastructure at scale. Owns CI/CD, observability, and incident
response for high-traffic platforms. Comfortable on-call; obsessive about SLOs,
error budgets, and cutting toil through automation.

SKILLS
Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, AWS (EKS, EC2, S3, IAM, CloudWatch), GCP,
Helm, ArgoCD, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Prometheus, Grafana,
Loki, ELK, Ansible, Linux, Bash, Python, Go, Istio service mesh, Vault.

EXPERIENCE
Senior SRE, FinTech Platform (2021–present)
- Migrated 40+ microservices to Kubernetes (EKS); cut deploy time 70% with
  ArgoCD GitOps and Helm charts.
- Built Prometheus/Grafana observability stack with SLO-based alerting and
  error budgets; reduced p95 latency 35% and paging volume 50%.
- Authored Terraform modules provisioning multi-account AWS landing zones;
  enforced policy-as-code with OPA.
- Led incident response and blameless postmortems; improved MTTR from 45 to
  12 minutes.

DevOps Engineer, E-commerce (2018–2021)
- Implemented CI/CD with Jenkins and GitHub Actions; containerized legacy
  monolith and introduced blue-green deploys.
- Set up centralized logging (ELK) and autoscaling; handled 5x festival-season
  traffic with zero downtime.

EDUCATION
B.Tech, Computer Science — NIT Trichy

CERTIFICATIONS
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), AWS Solutions Architect Associate,
HashiCorp Terraform Associate.
